reviews.review_description: My main concern was that this wouldn't be worth it since I already have the old version, but the improved graphics and new course layout makes it a new game all together..definitely worth getting.

developer_response.body: Hey, thanks for the feedback Chris. As well as a brand new course, our aim was to make improvements in all areas and also provide additional features. Glad your enjoying it.

reviews.review_description: Great game, the only issue I have is the ball being waayy to close to your body. I have to line the club up aboit a foot away from the ball in order to swing comfortably.  Is there an in game adjustment I'm missing?

developer_response.body: As this is the 'GO' version there is not a lot of capability to adjust and is setup for the majority of people, however in the Quest version of the game there are lots of options to adjust club length, height and position yourself etc.

reviews.review_description: Power is very inaccurate but that is my only complaint. Very cool other than that
Great game and just like real golf it can be very frustrating.

reviews.review_title: Many flaws, but thre's nothing better
reviews.review_description:
A significant improvement over the previous game by these developers and the best golf game available for Go/Quest, in my humble opinion.
BUT. There are a number of big problems, at least for me. 
- The hit power is still unpredictable and nowhere near as good as it used to be with the first game until it all went to he** sometime late spring or so. Was it an Oculus update? My controller seems to be perfectly fine. Anyways, to be completely frank, now it's even worse than in the previous game. Reaching 90+% with a driver is more or less possible, but doing so with a light club, - almost impossible, even if the swings are identical. 60% is a great result, which makes zero sense. 
- The problem of occasional "pushes" (when instead of the full-powered swing, only 2-3% power is registered and the ball advances by 2-3 meters) has not been eliminated. 
- There is still an issue when the ball will occasionally keep on rolling unrealistically until it finds hazard. I had a case when the ball rolled super slowly for about 2 minutes (~90 meters) until the game declared it was out of bounds, even though it was in the middle of the fairway. 
- Recentering, which you have to do often in this game, now sometimes changes the direction of your stance, so you will end up spinning and moving slowly in your room as you play, which may be an issue in a limited space. This problem was not present in the original game.

In other news, the greens are now several times faster, and while the previous game had them too slow, this one's got them too fast, imho :D. Not a problem, really. Also, the main menu is now a total usability nightmare. Very indie, I must say ;)

Anyways, there's nothing better than this out there, unfortunately, even on Quest (mini-golf or putting games are not golf, imho).

developer_response.body: Thanks for letting us know. Glad your enjoying it!

reviews.review_description: I knew a good VR golf game would be very difficult to do, little did I know this game existed. I tried it out and I’m confused on how anybody could NOT like the game. The visuals and graphics are outstanding, the “Fly-Over” or “Explore” options provides a a very clear visual layout of the course, the driving ranges are perfect for practicing various clubs and seeing what you may need to work on to improve. There won’t be a better golf game than this one, 11/10 would definitely recommend you to download it!!

developer_response.body:
Hey Mark,
Really appreciate the comments. Thanks so much and glad you are enjoying the game.

reviews.review_description: All in all I really love the game, the only problem I have is that you can't aim the ball and that the game will say you hit the ball when you didn't and it will also say that you did not use as much power as you did but these issues do not happen all the time so all in all I love it
Thank you for the response - Putting is much easier. Cheers

developer_response.body: Hi, we added a new feature for lining up putting. When on the green, Press and hold down on the controller pad, then by moving your finger left and right at the bottom of the pad you can fine tune. Your view also changes whilst your doing this. You can also now adjust club feel and green speed in the practise playground which may also assist. Hope this helps.
